reviews.name: 해****
reviews.content:
곧 발렌타인데이도 다가오고해서 저희집 강아지에게 선물 했어요!
곰에 묶여있는 하트 끈이 있어서 머리에 포인트를 줄 수도 있더라구요 ㅎㅎ (그래서 하나 더 주문!)
배에 노즈워크 포켓이 들어 있어서 장난감으로 활용하기도 좋고 집에 그냥 둬도 인테리어용으로 귀여운 곰돌이어서 여러모로 쓸 수 있을 것 같아요!!!
reviews.content_en: Valentine's Day is coming up soon, so I got this as a gift for my pup! There's a heart string tied to the bear that I can use as a hair accessory too haha (so I ordered another one!) The belly has a nose work pocket, so it's great to use as a toy, and it's such a cute bear that it works as decoration too if I just leave it around the house!!!

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 일단 까자마자 곰돌이 수색부터 하고 터그로 놀았다가 마무리는 노즈워크로! 장난감 하나로 다양하게 가지고 놀 수 있어서 너무너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I opened it, my dog searched for the bear and played tug with it, then finished with some nose work! I love that one toy can be played with in so many different ways!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
바잇미 러브베어 노즈워크 장난감
오랜만에 아이들을 위해서  노즈워크 장난감을
구입하였습니다!
비싼가격이지만ㅠㅠ 
아이들의 즐거움과 행복을 위해
우리아들들 노는모습도 보고싶기에 ^^
실제 받아보니 저도 갖고싶을 만큼 귀엽네요^^
사랑한다 꼬제들^^
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Love Bear Nose Work Toy
I bought a nose work toy for the kids after a long time!
It's pricey though ㅠㅠ
But for the kids' joy and happiness, I wanted to see them play ^^  
When I actually got it, it's so cute that I want one for myself too ^^
Love you guys ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡

요즘 코니의 최애 장난감♥️
노즈워크기능에 삑삑이도 있어서 너무 잘 가지고 놀아요! 노즈워크가 끝나면 그 부분을 잡고 터그놀이도 가능해요.
한입에 물고다니기 딱 좋은 사이즈라서 더 좋은거 같아요.  인형 자체가 너무 귀여워서, 하나 더 사서 제 책상에 올려두고 싶어요!~
reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest Employee Review🧡

Koni's favorite toy these days ♥️
The nose work feature and squeaker are so much fun! Once the nose work is done, you can grab that part and play tug with it too.
I love that it's the perfect size to carry in your mouth. The plush itself is so adorable that I want to buy another one and put it on my desk!~

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 발렌타인 기념으로 선물해줬는데 너무 잘가지고 놀아요... 곰돌이도 너무 귀엽고 노즈워크까지 있어서 장난감 별로 안좋아하는 강아지인데 아주 잘가지고 놉니다~~ 머리끈도 너무 이뻐요!!
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a Valentine's gift and my dog plays with it so well... The bear is so cute and it even has nose work! My pup doesn't usually like toys much, but she plays with this one really well~~ The hair bow is so pretty too!!

reviews.name: 징****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 곰돌이인데 노즈워크까지 가능해서 구입했습니다.
실물도 너무 이뻐서 저도 만족! 레오도 꺼내자마자 뺏어가서 잘 가지고 신나게 잘 가지고 놀았습니다 ^^
하지만 노즈워크용 간식을 넣는 곳이 좁아서 애기들이 간식을 잘 빼먹지 못하고 포기하네요
더 작은 간식이나 씹어도 덜 눌러 붙는 간식으로 하면 괜찮을 것 같긴 합니다!
reviews.content_en:
It's such a cute bear and I bought it because it has nose work capability too.
The real product looks great so I'm satisfied! Leo grabbed it right away and played with it excitedly ^^
But the nose work treat pocket is a bit narrow, so the pups have trouble getting the treats out and end up giving up.
I think it would work better with smaller treats or treats that don't stick as much!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 하트오브제부분이랑 곰돌이 너무 제 취향이라 하나 사봤어용 ㅋㅋㅋ 노즈워크 포켓 많아서 오래 놀기에 좋은 제품인듯요!
reviews.content_en: I loved the heart part and the bear so much that I bought one lol The nose work pockets are plentiful so it seems like a great product for extended playtime!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 이런 종류? 노즈워크를 제일 좋아해서 오랜만에 신상으로 사줬더니 너무 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ 바잇미 1위 상품이라 믿고 구입했어요 ! 배송도 너무 빠르고 좋네요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves this type of nose work, so I got a new one after a while and she loves it haha I trusted and bought it because it's BITE ME's #1 product! Shipping was super fast too

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
재구매!
먼저 2개 구매하고
너무 귀여워서 
또 2개 더 구입...
장점은  무지 귀엽고 사랑스러워요..
그런데 단점이 있네요...ㅠㅠ
노즈워크 치고 간식 넣을 공간이 너무 좁고 공간도 
생각보다 너무 없어요 ㅠㅠ
그리고 아이들이 너무 쉽게 찾으니 순식간에 3초만에 끝
삑 삑 소리도 사람이 세게 눌러야 날 정도...
그냥 귀엽고  제가 가지고 싶어서
 소장용으로 구입했다는게
맞는 사실
노즈워크라고 하기에는 무리
완전 1살 아기들이 가지고 놀기에 딱..
다음에는 간식공간, 여유공간도 많이 많이
소리도 살짝만 눌러도
삑 삑 삑 소리가 잘 나도록 해주세요!
제발!  제발! 제발..!
reviews.content_en:
Repurchase!
Bought 2 first, then thought they were so cute so bought 2 more...
The pros are that they're incredibly cute and lovable..
But there are cons ㅠㅠ
For a nose work toy, the treat compartment is way too narrow and there's much less space than I expected ㅠㅠ
And the kids find it too easily, so it's done in like 3 seconds
The squeaker sound barely comes out unless you press it hard...
I basically bought it because it's cute and I wanted to keep one myself
It's not really nose work
Perfect for 1-year-old babies to play with..
Next time please make the treat compartment and extra space much bigger and the squeaker sound come out more easily with just a light press!
Please! Please! Please..!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 배송빠르고 좋아요 쿠폰써서 저렴히 그매햇습니당! 넘귀엽네요 근데 삑삑인 바로 고장낫어요ㅠ
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and good! Got it cheap with a coupon! It's so cute but the squeaker broke right away ㅠ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
노즈워크장난감인데 색상도 내가 좋아하는 핑크라 이쁘고 귀여워서 소장용으로 하고 싶을정도네요ㅋㅋ
좀더 아끼다가 막둥이 장난감으로 줘야겠어요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's a nose work toy and the pink color I like is pretty and cute, so I want to keep it as a collectible lol I should save it a bit more and give it to my youngest as a toy hehe

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 장난감 너무 좋아해서 매번 사주는데 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 배송 빠르고 삑삑이가 들어있어서 좋아요^^
reviews.content_en: My pup loves toys so I buy them every time and she plays well with them~ Fast shipping and it has a squeaker so I love it ^^

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여운데 세일해서 샀어요 빠른배송 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and I bought it because it was on sale Thank you for the fast shipping

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워서 바로 구매했어요 ㅎ 크기도 알맞아서 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It's so cute I bought it right away ㅎ The size is perfect too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 장난감이에요 
곰돌이 배 안에 노즈워크도 할 수 있고 하트 고무줄로 터그놀이도 가능해서 1석2조에요!
reviews.content_en:
It's such an adorable toy!
You can do nose work inside the bear's belly and play tug with the heart rubber string, so it's like getting two toys in one!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 좋아요~ 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요. 장난감은 항상 여기서만 주문합니다^^ 삑삑이 최고 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great! My dog plays with it well. I always order toys from here ^^ The squeaker is the best hehe

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요~ 배송 빨랐어요. 삑삑이 들어있어서 더 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: My dog plays with it well~ Shipping was fast. She likes it even more because it has a squeaker

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 넘 귀여워요 잘 가지고 노네요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and she plays with it well

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 인형을 워낙좋아해서 택배 오자마자 내놓으라고 난리 ㅋ 안에 간식 넣어줬는데 간식이 빠지질않아서 넣은상태로 질겅질겅 씹어버리네요 ㅋ 뭐 어떻게든 갖고놀기만하면 되죠
reviews.content_en: My pup loves plushies so much, as soon as the package came she demanded I take it out lol I put treats inside and they don't fall out so she just chews and chews with them in there haha Well, as long as she's playing with it that's what matters

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
귀여운데 뭔가 무섭게 생기기도 ㅋㅋㅋ
잘가지고 놀아서 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's cute but looks a bit scary haha But it's good because she plays with it well~

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 여기 장난감을 제일 좋아해서 자주 사주고 있어요~
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and I love the toys here so I buy them often~

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 이번에 배송온 곰돌이가 얼굴이 찌그러진 곰돌인데, 교환 고민하다 그냥 뎃구있으려구요.
reviews.content_en: The bear that arrived this time has a squished face, but I'm just going to keep it as is instead of exchanging it.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
품질이나 디테일함이 좀 떨어지네요.
노즈워크 주머니도 너무작고..
예쁘지않은 제품이 와서 실망스러워요.
reviews.content_en:
The quality and details are a bit lacking.
The nose work pockets are too small too..
I'm disappointed that an unattractive product arrived.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 다음부턴 그냥 실리콘으로 된 노즈워크장난감만 사야겠어요..
reviews.content_en: Next time I'm just going to buy silicone nose work toys..

reviews.name: 늅****
reviews.content: 너무 귀엽게 생겼어요 왠일로 맘에 든 인형찾았어요
reviews.content_en: It's so adorably made! Surprisingly found a plushie I actually like

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 우리딸아이에게 막둥강아지 장난감 골라보라고했더니 골랐어요. 사심이 가득한 초이스였다고 생각했는데, 강아지도 노즈워크 어려워해서 만족하고 노즈워크 안할땐 딸아이가 더 좋아하네요.ㅎㅎ 이런게 일타이피 인가요?
reviews.content_en: I asked my daughter to pick a toy for our baby pup and she chose this. I thought it was a selfish choice on her part, but the dog struggles with the nose work so she's satisfied, and when not doing nose work my daughter loves it even more lol Is this what they call a win-win?

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content:
구매하고 받자마자 발렌타인 선물받은듯 기분이너무좋았네요:)
이미 하트는 곰돌이랑 분리됬지만 노즈워크천도있고 삑삑이도되서 둘째가 지몸만한대도 잘 물고 놀아요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
As soon as I bought and received it, I felt like I got a Valentine's gift :)
The heart is already separated from the bear but it has the nose work cloth and squeaker too, and my second pup even though she's smaller can grab and play with it well hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 제가 갖고 싶어서 구매했는데 강아지한테 뺏겼어요... 뽀짝한 카드까지 있어서 강아지한테 선물하는 것처럼 기분 내기 좋아요!! 노즈워크가 어려워서 오랫동안 가지고 놀더라고요!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I wanted one myself but my dog took it from me... It even comes with a cute card so it feels nice to gift it to your pup!! The nose work is pretty challenging so she played with it for a long time!

reviews.name: 염****
reviews.content: 받자마자 노즈워크간식 넣어서 주니 잘놀아요ㅋ 울딸래미 덩치는큰데 인형이 작아서 낑낑거리며 간식찾는게 넘 귀엽네요ㅋ
reviews.content_en: As soon as it arrived I put treats in the nose work pocket and she plays great with it hehe My pup is big but the toy is small so watching her grunt and search for treats is so cute hehe

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 좋아요 신상 아주굳굳이오
reviews.content_en: Good! Brand new product, super solid!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 신상좋아해요 또사야겟슴다
reviews.content_en: Love the new product! Definitely buying it again 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 노즈워크도 할 수 있고 귀엽고 예뻐요.
reviews.content_en: Can do nose work games with it, and it's so cute and pretty.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 빠른배송 감사합니다 신상좋어요!!ㅋㅌㅌ
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the fast shipping! Love the new product!! 😂

reviews.name: 곽****
reviews.content: 예쁘고 잘가지고 놀아용
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and my pup loves playing with it!

reviews.name: 늅****
reviews.content: 샀는데 잘놀아서 선물로 샀어요
reviews.content_en: Bought it and my dog loves it so much, so I got it as a gift for someone else too
